query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'taskGroups' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%code%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'taskGroups' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%code%';
